text:
Reported
under
serverStatus. network. ingressRequestRateLimiter:
db. serverStatus().network. ingressRequestRateLimiter
Field
rejectedAdmissions
successfulAdmissions
exemptedAdmissions
attemptedAdmissions
totalAvailableTokens
Meaning
Total requests rejected by the rate limiter
Total requests admitted (excluding exempt)
Total requests that bypassed the limiter (unauthenticated, priority port, CIDR/app exemptions)
Total non-exempt requests that attempted admission
Current token bucket capacity (how many requests can be admitted right now)
Note: The request
rate
limiter does
not
queue - it uses tryAcquireToken (immediate reject), so you won't see queue-related fields here. That's by design: rejected requests get
IngressRequestRateLimitExceeded immediately.
Connection Establishment Rate Limiter (SessionEstablishmentRateLimiter)
Reported
in two places:
serverStatus.queues.ingressSessionEstablishment
db. serverStatus(). queues. ingressSessionEstablishment
Field
Meaning
addedToQueue
Total connections that entered the wait queue
removedFromQueue
Total connections that left the queue (admitted)
interruptedInQueue
Connections interrupted while waiting (e.g. shutdown)
rejectedAdmissions
Connections rejected outright (queue full or queue depth = 0)
exemptedAdmissions
Connections that bypassed the limiter (CIDR exemptions)
successfulAdmissions
Connections successfully admitted
attemptedAdmissions
Total non-exempt connection attempts
averageTimeQueuedMicros
Average time connections spent waiting
in queue
totalAvailableTokens
Current token bucket capacity
serverStatus.connections
db. serverStatus() . connections
Field
queuedForEstablishment
establishmentRateLimit.rejected
establishmentRateLimit.exempted
establishmentRateLimit.interruptedDueToClientDisconnect
Meaning
Connections currently waiting in the queue
Total rejected connections
Total exempted connections
Client hung up while queued
